Hz
st
Chord: —

Key (Do)

Keyboard
—
PLAY Computer keyboard: Q-U / I-] / Z-. play white keys, number row / A,S / F-L play black keys (low/mid/high octave rows). Press Esc for command mode (? for help). Base octave: C4
Metronome
BPM
Drones
Chord: —
Note Freq Detune (¢ / Hz) Solo Mute
—
00000 0000
Presets:
MIDI Keyboard
Not connected

Connect a class compliant USB or Bluetooth MIDI keyboard. Incoming Note On/Off will trigger the on screen instrument and respect temperament settings.

COMMAND MODE press a key · Esc or Enter to return to play
Transport
SpaceStop all (panic)
mMetronome start/stop
,.Tempo −/+ (Shift ×10)
tTemperament Equal↔Pure
hHold on/off
Navigate
dDrones tab
sShruti tab
bDrawbars tab
wCycle keyboard wave
[]Keyboard volume −/+
Pitch & key
←→Transpose −/+
↑↓Octave −/+
kSet key (Do)… then c-b, or 0=Auto
rReset transpose + key
ngToggle note / solfège labels
Drones / Shruti / Bars
xShruti: clear all
pDrawbars: play/stop
1–7Drawbar presets
